decision: Add GET /api/health (public, no requireAuth) returning {status,db,terminal,time} with 200 (both up) / 503 (either down). DB check = lib/db/pg.ts ping() (SELECT 1) in try/catch -> bool. Terminal check = TCP connect to 127.0.0.1:TERMINAL_PORT (default 4201, env-overridable) with short timeout -> bool; no terminal-server change, does not trip F1b WS auth. Point Dockerfile HEALTHCHECK and deploy/docker-compose.yml daax-web healthcheck at /api/health (daax-web ONLY; daax-terminal healthcheck deferred to F3 per issue). Tests: Vitest unit (mock ping + net for 200/503) + integration (real PG up->200/down->503).
rationale: No middleware.ts -> per-route auth, so omitting requireAuth satisfies AC#3. ping() already exists. terminal-server is a bare WebSocketServer with no HTTP surface, so a TCP-connect probe is the minimal non-auth reachability check. App+terminal share one container pre-F3, so 127.0.0.1:4201 is correct; F3 revisits per-plane.

decision: daax.localhost is served by parent dx compose (/Users/jasonpoley/prj/dx/docker-compose.yml, project dx, service daax-web, image dx/daax-web:local), NOT this repo's compose. Deployed image is 2026-06-06 (8 days stale, pre-Phase-0). The dx stack has NO postgres service and NO DATABASE_URL for daax-web. Current main (Phase 0 #92/#93) runs catalog/releases on Postgres, and F7's health check probes the DB. Refreshing daax.localhost to current main requires adding a postgres (+ migrate) service and DATABASE_URL to the parent dx repo — a cross-repo infra change requiring operator approval.
rationale: Operator chose 'refresh now + after each issue'. Without Postgres in the dx stack, current daax-web deploys with DB-backed features broken and, once HEALTHCHECK points at the DB-checking /api/health, the container is marked unhealthy by design (fail-closed).

decision: Refreshed daax.localhost to current main. Edited /Users/jasonpoley/prj/dx/docker-compose.yml: added postgres (postgres:18-alpine, no host port, daax-pg-data volume, pg_isready healthcheck), migrate one-shot (bun run db:migrate), and to daax-web: DATABASE_URL + DAAX_WS_TOKEN_SECRET + depends_on(postgres healthy, migrate completed). Generated DAAX_WS_TOKEN_SECRET into gitignored dx/.env; documented PG+WS keys in dx/.env.example. Rebuilt dx/daax-web:local and brought up stack.
rationale: dx stack lacked Postgres (pre-Phase-0) and would reject the terminal WS upgrade (1008) without the ticket secret on the non-loopback Traefik path.
validation: VERIFIED: 3 migrations applied; daax.localhost / and /api/health/backlog -> 200; postgres+daax-web healthy; ticket mint -> 200; WS upgrade via Traefik ACCEPTED (subprotocol daax-ws-ticket).

decision: F7 (#98) implemented, validated, deployed, PR #150 opened (Closes #98), Copilot review requested. Files: app/api/health/route.ts, Dockerfile, deploy/docker-compose.yml, tests/api/health-route.test.ts, tests/integration/health-pg.test.ts.
rationale: All 4 ACs met and verified live on daax.localhost (healthy + 200 no-auth). Gates: unit 4/4, integration 3/3, typecheck/lint/format clean, host+docker build pass.
validation: Producer Claude Opus 4.8; Validator gpt-5-codex (cross-provider) APPROVE-WITH-NITS; 2 actionable nits fixed (test DB-isolation, TERMINAL_PORT validation), 1 documented follow-up (shared pool connectionTimeoutMillis). Copilot review pending. Operator-merge pending.
